story.text:
# ✨ Hold Witness
**🌀 → 👁️ → 🚫 → 🔒**
*lethe · cosmological · V25*

Receive the witness into the dark substrate. Admit the witness to be unretrievable. Constrain its motion to the river's banks.

> The witness sinks. The substrate closes around it. The proof of existence remains; the content does not.

*Keywords:* hold · witness · unretrievable · substrate · cosmological · v38
